languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

languages.text: "Трон Терры, неужели это сыны Крига? В последний раз я слышал о них еще в бытность офицером, и тогда они сражались с ксеносами бесконечно далеко от Простора Коронус. Как это богомерзкое создание ухитрилось доставить их... в этот музей?"
languages.translation_comment: Found Kriegs in the Trazyn Museum (an exhibit with them)

languages.text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"
languages.original_text: "Трон Терры, неужели это сыны Крига? В последний раз я слышал о них еще в бытность офицером, и тогда они сражались с ксеносами бесконечно далеко от Простора Коронус. Как это богомерзкое создание ухитрилось доставить их... в этот музей?"

traits.locale_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

"Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

"Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

languages.text: 「テラ王座、これ本当にクリーグの兵の息子たちなの？ 最後に聞いたのは、私が将校だった頃で、彼らは何光年離れた異星世界で戦っていた。その卑劣な生き物がどうやって彼らをこの…博物館に連れてきたんだ？」
languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

traits.locale_text: 「テラ王座、これ本当に Krieg の息子たちなの？ 最後に聞いたのは、私が将校だった頃で、彼らは何光年離れた異星世界で戦っていた。その卑劣な生き物がどうやって彼らをこの…博物館に連れてきたんだ？」

languages.text: « Par le Trône de Terra, ce sont vraiment les fils de Krieg ? La dernière fois que j'ai entendu parler d'eux, j'étais encore officier et ils affrontaient des xénos bien loin des Étendues de Koronus. Comment cette odieuse créature a-t-elle fait pour les amener dans ce... musée ? »
languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

traits.locale_text: « Par le Trône de Terra, ce sont vraiment les fils de Krieg ? La dernière fois que j'ai entendu parler d'eux, j'étais encore officier et ils affrontaient des xénos bien loin des Étendues de Koronus. Comment cette odieuse créature a-t-elle fait pour les amener dans ce... musée ? »

languages.text: "Thron von Terra, sind das wirklich die Söhne von Krieg? Ich habe zuletzt von ihnen gehört, als ich ein Offizier war, und damals haben sie fern der Koronus-Ausdehnung auf Xenos-Welten gekämpft. Wie hat es diese ruchlose Kreatur geschafft, sie in dieses ... Museum zu bringen?"
languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

traits.locale_text: "Thron von Terra, sind das wirklich die Söhne von Krieg? Ich habe zuletzt von ihnen gehört, als ich ein Offizier war, und damals haben sie fern der Koronus-Ausdehnung auf Xenos-Welten gekämpft. Wie hat es diese ruchlose Kreatur geschafft, sie in dieses ... Museum zu bringen?"

languages.text: "Terra'nın Tahtı aşkına! Bunlar gerçekten Krieg'in oğulları mı? Onları en son subayken işitmiştim. O zamanlar Koronus Enginliği'nden dünyalarca uzakta zenolarla savaşıyorlardı. O iğrenç yaratık, onları bu... Müzeye getirmeyi nasıl başarmış ki?"
languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

traits.locale_text: "Terra'nın Tahtı aşkına! Bunlar gerçekten Krieg'in oğulları mı? Onları en son subayken işitmiştim. O zamanlar Koronus Enginliği'nden dünyalarca uzakta zenolarla savaşıyorlardı. O iğrenç yaratık, onları bu... Müzeye getirmeyi nasıl başarmış ki?"

languages.text: «Por el Trono de Terra, ¿de verdad son estos los hijos de Krieg? La última vez que supe de ellos aún era oficial, y estaban luchando en mundos xenos bien apartados de la Extensión de Koronus. ¿Cómo ha logrado esa horrible criatura traerlos hasta este... museo?».
languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

traits.locale_text: «Por el Trono de Terra, ¿de verdad son estos los hijos de Krieg? La última vez que supe de ellos aún era oficial, y estaban luchando en mundos xenos bien apartados de la Extensión de Koronus. ¿Cómo ha logrado esa horrible criatura traerlos hasta este... museo?».

languages.text: “泰拉黄金王座在上，这些真的是克里格之子吗？我上一次听说他们的事还是在当军官时，那时他们正在远离科罗努斯扩区的地方，与异形激战。那可恶的怪物究竟是如何将他们带来这个……博物馆的？”
languages.original_text: "Throne of Terra, are these really the sons of Krieg? I last heard of them back when I was an officer, and then they were fighting xenos worlds away from the Koronus Expanse. How did that heinous creature succeed in bringing them to this... museum?"

traits.locale_text: “泰拉黄金王座在上，这些真的是克里格之子吗？我上一次听说他们的事还是在当军官时，那时他们正在远离科罗努斯扩区的地方，与异形激战。那可恶的怪物究竟是如何将他们带来这个……博物馆的？”
